chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 5240 of 2016 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at Flag-A 2. For hearing of main case 08-09-2021 Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- None present on behalf of the petitioner nor is any intimation received. On the last date of hearing as well, petitioner’s Counsel was absent and adjournment was sought. Be that as it may, we have gone through the prayer and are of the view that the Petition is misconceived, as apparently, the relief being sought is against the private persons. Accordingly, Petition being misconceived is hereby dismissed. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
